title: Cytooxien Server Pack
description: Server-friendly Minecraft modpack with performance optimizations and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
# 🍀 Cytooxien Server Pack

Cytooxien is a Minecraft modpack designed for, curated for both singleplayer and server use. All included mods are fully server-allowed, providing a balanced experience without breaking gameplay.

# ✨ Features

- All mods are server-allowed — play without restrictions
- Optimized performance for smoother gameplay
- Quality of Life (QoL) improvements for easier management
- Visual enhancements with no gameplay advantages
- Designed for exploration, tech, and adventure


<details>
<summary>🛠️ Included Mods</summary>

## ⚡ Performance & Optimization

- Sodium & Indium – Graphics & performance improvements
- Lithium – General game optimizations
- Ferrite Core – Memory optimizations
- Entity Culling – Reduce lag by limiting entity rendering

## 🧭 Quality of Life & Interface

- Simple Voice Chat – Voice communication with friends
- Better Advancements – Enhanced advancement tracking
- Trigger Sit – Sit anywhere
- Zoomify – Zoom in on any location
- Borderless Fullscreen – Seamless fullscreen experience

## 🎨 Cosmetic & Visuals

- 3D Skin Layers – Make player skins appear 3D

## 🔧 Utilities

- Mod Menu – Manage mods easily
- Continuity – Fixes block & animation continuity
- Fast IP Ping – Quick server ping checks

</details>



# 🍀 About This Modpack
_Cytooxien is a community-created modpack focused on enhancing gameplay while staying 100% server-friendly. It is perfect for both solo and multiplayer adventures, offering tech, exploration, and QoL improvements without giving unfair advantages._

**Please give me your feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
